examples.title: Voxel Downsampling
examples.code:
ALGORITHM VoxelFilter
INPUT: PointCloud, leaf_size
BEGIN
  Create 3D grid with cube edges = leaf_size
  FOR each voxel:
    IF voxel contains points:
      OUTPUT centroid
END
examples.explanation: Divides space into cubes and replaces points with voxel centroids
examples.spaceComplexity: O(k) where k = number of voxels
